name: Puget Sound Kayaking
reason: Tandem kayaking on Lake Union with houseboat views — pairs people naturally for one-on-one conversation.

name: Pike Place Market Tour
reason: Guided tour through Seattle's iconic market with tastings — creates shared food memories and conversation starters.

name: Escape Room Challenge
reason: Collaborative puzzle-solving that surfaces team problem-solving patterns in a fun, low-pressure setting.

name: Museum of Pop Culture Visit
reason: Interactive music and pop culture exhibits where teams can explore at their own pace and reconnect to share highlights.

name: Cooking Class — Pacific NW Cuisine
reason: Hands-on cooking with local ingredients builds collaboration — everyone contributes to a shared meal.

name: Discovery Park Nature Hike
reason: Coastal trail hike through old-growth forest to a lighthouse — nature walks promote reflective, open conversation.

name: Glassblowing Workshop
reason: Unique hands-on creative experience where everyone makes something — a tangible team memento to take home.

name: Underground Tour
venue: Bill Speidel's Underground Tour, Pioneer Square
reason: Humorous historical tour beneath Seattle streets — entertaining shared experience with great group photo opportunities.

name: Yoga & Meditation at Kerry Park
reason: Morning yoga overlooking the Seattle skyline and Mt. Rainier — sets a calm, focused tone for the day.

name: Axe Throwing
reason: Fun competitive activity that breaks down workplace hierarchy — everyone starts as a beginner together.
